mapper.sql: A.NINPUT_SEQ, A.NPID, A.SIF_ID, A.SSYS_NM, A.STB_NM, A.DSTART_DT, A.DEND_DT, A.DTOTAL_TIME, A.NCNT, A.SSTEP_STATUS, A.SBATCH_END_YN, A.DCREATE_DT, A.DMODIFY_DT

sql.trim:
1 = 1
AND A.SIF_ID like '%' || #{sifId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SSYS_NM like '%' || #{ssysNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'

mapper.select: SELECT A.NINPUT_SEQ, A.NPID , A.SIF_ID, A.SSYS_NM , A.STB_NM , A.DSTART_DT , A.DEND_DT , A.SCOMMENT , (DATE_PART('MINUTE',A.DTOTAL_TIME)||'분'||LPAD(DATE_PART('SECOND',A.DTOTAL_TIME),6,'0')||'초') AS DTOTAL_TIME , A.NCNT , A.SSTEP_STATUS , A.SBATCH_END_YN , A.DCREATE_DT , A.DMODIFY_DT FROM BIF.TB_BATCH_LOG A

SELECT A.NINPUT_SEQ , A.SIF_ID , A.SSYS_NM , A.DSTART_DT , A.DEND_DT , (DATE_PART('MINUTE',A.DTOTAL_TIME)||'분'||LPAD(DATE_PART('SECOND',A.DTOTAL_TIME),6,'0')||'초') AS DTOTAL_TIME , A.NCNT , A.SSTEP_STATUS , A.SBATCH_END_YN FROM BIF.TB_BATCH_LOG A

SELECT B.BAT_MST_SEQ, B.LNK_SVC_MST_SEQ, B.SIF_ID, B.SSYSTEM_NM, B.STABLE_NM, B.SSCRIPT_PATH, B.SSCRIPT_NM, B.SINTERLOCK_PATH, B.SINTERLOCK_NM, B.SPROVIDER_SYS, B.SPERIOD, B.BATCH_SDT, B.LINKTYPE, B.SOPSTATE, B.SCOMMENT, B.DCREATE_DT, B.SCREATE_ID, B.DMODIFY_DT, B.SMODIFY_ID FROM BIF.TB_BATCH_SVC_BAS B INNER JOIN BIF.TB_BATCH_LOG L ON B.SIF_ID = L.SIF_ID WHERE 1=1
L.NINPUT_SEQ = #{ninputSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT COUNT(1) TOTALCOUNT FROM BIF.TB_BATCH_LOG A
